about.title: About me
about.description: Associate Degree holder (TSU) and Software Development Engineering student passionate about clean architecture, design patterns, and scalable systems.

timeline.event: Started professional training at the Universidad Tecnológica de Xicotepec de Juárez.
Internship at INAOE; technical collaboration on the SCAA project.
Started Software Development and Management Engineering after obtaining the TSU degree.
Acquired 'The Pragmatic Programmer'; deepening knowledge in software engineering culture.

architecture.title: Architecture & Design
architecture.principles: SOLID • DRY • KISS • Hexagonal Architecture • Clean Code

Soodan.name: Soodan
Soodan.description: Comprehensive telemedicine and clinical management platform designed to digitalize medical operations. Implements a robust architecture for appointment management, electronic records and inventory control, prioritizing the security of sensitive data.
features: Advanced Security: PHI data encryption and OTP verification.
Biometrics: Secure access through biometrics in the mobile version.
Scalable Architecture: Feature-First design with SOLID principles and decoupled layers.
Audit: Exhaustive logging of security events and access logs.

ModuloConfiguracion.name: Multi-platform Configuration Module
ModuloConfiguracion.description: Development of a hardware-level configuration module for a multi-platform application focused on accessibility. Project carried out during a technical internship under the direction and mentorship of INAOE researchers.
ModuloConfiguracion.confidentiality: Technical details and source code not disclosed due to confidentiality agreements.
highlights: Low-level Interaction: Integration with native operating system APIs (Win32) via FFI for controlling multiple monitors, brightness levels and audio output devices.
Clean Architecture: Modular design under the 'Feature-First' approach, strictly applying SOLID principles, Dependency Injection and design patterns (DAO, DTO, Singleton, Facade).
Professional Methodology: Development executed under the agile Scrum framework, with advanced branch management using GitFlow and GitLab pipelines.
State Management: Robust implementation of user profile saving, hardware exception handling and data synchronization with local SQLite.
ModuloConfiguracion.mentorship: Developed in collaboration with the National Institute of Astrophysics, Optics and Electronics (INAOE).

BienesRaices.name: Real Estate SOA
BienesRaices.description: Comprehensive platform for the buying and selling of real estate based on service-oriented architecture (SOA). Includes user management, real-time geolocation and an advanced security system.
highlights: Security: Implementation of RSA encryption and user validation through JWT tokens.
Geolocation: Integration of dynamic maps for precise property location.
SOA Architecture: Scalable design based on services for email and image handling.
Fullstack: Complete development of the lifecycle, from database modeling to UI.

ScannerMX.name: Scanner.mx
ScannerMX.description: Multi-platform application specialized in automated data extraction (OCR) from official Mexican documents (INE and CURP). Designed under a 'Privacy-First' approach, sensitive information processing is carried out entirely locally (On-Device).
patterns: Strategy Pattern: Implemented for dynamic processing of different document types (INE, CURP).
Factory Method: Used in DocParserFactory for the instantiation of specialized parsers.
Dependency Injection: To decouple hardware services (Biometry, Media) from business logic.
Repository/Controller Pattern: Centralization of identity logic and data flow.
highlights: Privacy-First: Local OCR processing without persistence or transmission of personal data (PII) to external servers.
Biometric Security: Protected access through native FaceID and fingerprint integration.
Structural Validation: Use of advanced regular expressions for CURP and RFC verification.
Clean Architecture: Design based on Clean Architecture and Feature-First, ensuring high cohesion.
Input Versatility: Support for real-time capture, gallery and PDF files.

CarWashAPI.name: CarWash Management API
CarWashAPI.description: Robust REST API for the management of automotive maintenance services. The system centralizes appointment management, product inventory and vehicle control, with a strong focus on hierarchical security.
highlights: RBAC System: Implementation of Role-Based Access Control to differentiate permissions between administrators, employees and customers.
Modular Architecture: Feature-First design to facilitate system maintenance and scalability.
Automated Testing: Suite of integration and unit tests that guarantee the integrity of authentication and business flows.
Security: Data encryption layer for sensitive information and session management through long-duration tokens.
